The purpose of the pavilion design was to be calm and quiet. This design choice aimed to create a serene environment for those who would use the space. It was intended to reflect a sense of peace and stillness. The materials and layout were carefully selected to enhance this feeling. The structure was meant to blend with its surroundings without overwhelming them. The overall goal was to provide a place for reflection and relaxation. This concept was central to the entire design process. The result was a space that felt both inviting and calming.

It provided a clear objective for the design team to follow. This assumption proved to be a valuable starting point.
